name: Second Wind
description: You have a limited well of stamina you can draw on to protect yourself. On your turn, you can use a Bonus Action to regain HP equal to 1d10 + your Fighter level. You must finish a Short or Long Rest before using this feature again.
mitigation_notes: Usable once per Short or Long Rest. Fighter level bonus is handled by the DM layer (add as bonus to the healing roll).
